---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Korvun
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope and impact

- Which area does this touch? (channel, router, brain, model, policy,
  conversation/storage, config, CI, docs)
- Would it need a new external dependency? (these require a justifying ADR)
- Does it fit the roadmap? (see `docs/ROADMAP-V1.md`)

## Additional context

Links to relevant ADRs, stage docs, or upstream references.
